positive: A stylized celestial jungle scene featuring a graceful, bioluminescent fox curled around flowering vines and giant luminous fungi. The composition is centrally balanced and symmetrical, designed for optimal apparel printing. Use bold, clean vector lines combined with the soft glow of digital painting elements. The color palette should be dominated by deep indigo, vibrant teal, luminous magenta, and electric cyan, suggesting a nocturnal, magical atmosphere. Focus on strong silhouettes, geometric leaf patterns, and contrasting highlights. Minimalist depth of field, perfect for a graphic tee or poster art. High contrast, clean linework, UHD, graphic novel quality.
